snapshot:
Ferritin sits below the male functional floor and red-cell indices are running small — the picture lines up with iron-restricted erythropoiesis even with hemoglobin still in range. The plan below leans on heme-iron foods, paired with vitamin-C produce at the same meal for absorption.

A separate observation: cooking patterns suggest the easiest dinner-window habit is a 10-minute walk after the last bite. That habit is the cheapest cardiometabolic lever available and goes into the stack as the second move.

insights.title: Iron-restricted erythropoiesis pattern
insights.detail: Ferritin at 32 ng/mL sits well below the male functional floor of 70, and MCV at 86 fL is below the functional 88. Even with hemoglobin still in lab range, this is the picture that often presents as fatigue, exercise intolerance, and brain fog.

insights.title: Post-meal walking is the cheapest lever you have
insights.detail: Independent of the iron picture: a 10-minute walk after dinner consistently moves post-meal glucose and triglyceride disposal in the right direction. Worth pinning as a daily habit while iron repletion runs its 8-12 week course.

eatList.why: Most absorbable form of iron; addresses ferritin directly.

eatList.food: Lentils paired with a vitamin-C produce (bell pepper, tomato, citrus)
eatList.portion: 1 cup cooked lentils + 1 cup of the produce
eatList.why: Non-heme iron with vitamin C at the same meal multiplies absorption.

avoidList.food: Strong tea or coffee within an hour of an iron-rich meal
avoidList.why: Tannins blunt non-heme iron absorption substantially.
avoidList.swap: Tea between meals; water or sparkling water at the table.

lifestyle.title: 10-minute walk after dinner
lifestyle.why: Improves post-meal glucose and triglyceride disposal.
lifestyle.how: Right after eating, around the block or up and down the stairs.

habitStack.intro: Five small actions that compound across the week.

habits.title: Plan one red-meat dinner
habits.cue: When you write the week's meals
habits.why: Locks in the heme-iron dose for ferritin.

habits.title: 10-min walk after dinner
habits.why: Cheapest post-meal glucose lever there is.

retest.reason: Iron repletion through food typically resolves the picture over 8-12 weeks.
